title: fraxinus × hybrida
intro: Fraxinus × hybrida, also known as hybrid ash, is a deciduous tree that is a cross between the white ash (Fraxinus americana) and black ash (Fraxinus nigra). The bark and leaves of the Fraxinus × hybrida plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Fraxinus × hybrida include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating wounds, as well as being used as a natural remedy for skin conditions and respiratory issues. Fraxinus × hybrida is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its bark can also be dried and made into a tea or tincture for medicinal use.
